name: mcp-server-pulumi
description: Server for programmatic Pulumi operations via Model Context Protocol.

rating.reason: This toolset demonstrates good documentation quality with clear, specific tool names and mostly comprehensive descriptions. The Pulumi registry tools (get-type, get-resource, etc.) have well-structured parameter documentation with helpful examples. The pulumi-resource-search tool stands out with exceptional detail including syntax rules and usage patterns. However, some tools like the CLI operations (preview, up, refresh) have minimal descriptions that don't explain their purpose or when to use them, and the deploy-to-aws tool lacks parameter documentation entirely. The overall quality is good but inconsistent across tools.
